docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $750.00 FILED BY ZAND ROBERT IND DBA MARK MORRIS TIRE AS TO DEFENDANT EXCELLENT SECURITY PATROL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-31-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZAND ROBERT IND DBA MARK MORRIS TIRE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EXCELLENT SECURITY PATROL $274.63 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $322.63 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
